author: Kayleigh Mattoon
review: While working with Casey was enjoyable and he was attentive to our property needs, I cannot give 5 stars. Casey works hard, however, unfortunately, he has abysmal staff who do not communicate with the tenant or with Casey appropriately.

author: Paige Nausha
review: We rented from Evergreen Properties NW for approximately 5 years. We were in the unit for 6 years, but it was managed by another company for the first year or so. We are VERY glad that Evergreen Properties NW took over because from then on,

ownerResponse.text:
Paige,

Thank you for the review!  It was wonderful having you both as tenants and would welcome you back anytime!

author: Dan Oliva
review: Evergreen was so helpful throughout the process - they went above and beyond to keep me updated on properties that were opening up soon. They were always patient and professional when I contacted them. I highly recommend Evergreen Properties NW to anyone looking to rent in the Bellingham area!

author: Zack Elan
review:
incompetent and inconsiderate - they will waste your time.

I made an appointment to view one of their available rentals. told the guy I'd

ownerResponse.text:
Zack,

We are sorry that this happened.  Our units are first come first serve and we accepted an application an hour before your viewing appointment.  Again, we are sorry about this.

author: RYAN HIMMEL
review: Just took over a lease and the whole process was super easy. This is by far the most ethical property management company in the area. Casey specifically is very helpful and responds very quickly with any questions that you may have .

ownerResponse.text: Hi, Ryan, Thank you for the kind review.  We are happy to have you as a tenant!

author: Bryant Nichols
review: This was my experience with Casey and the group which was awful to say the least.

ownerResponse.text:
Oh, Bryant. This review does not surprise me.    Im sorry you feel this way. However, You and your perpetually bitter girlfriend were quite difficult most of time. (Tenants we strive to avoid if I had to be completely honest)  I personally worked with you on many occasions while you were in the process of searching for a home and put up with your dishonestly and excuses the entire time...Sadly, no matter how hard we tried, you werent pleased.  Fortunately for us, you guys moved on.  Please call the office and ask for Casey should you have additional concerns.  Id love to discuss this with you in person.

Best of luck to you both!

author: Savannah Hoffman
review: Evergreen Properties has been nothing but helpful and kind towards me as a new tenant. They are incredibly easy to get ahold of and care greatly about any of the needs and concerns I have. They are the best property management group I have rented from in Bellingham!

author: CALEB LEE
review: Most helpful rental agency in Bellingham. Being a college town, renting can be stressful here at times. Casey and Rebecca at evergreen have made our renting experience as easy as possible. The women in the office have always been helpful

author: Cory Cavness
review:
After working with several mangment companies over the years, Evergreen Properties NW was wonderful to rent from.
They are easily available to get ahold of and fulfill maintenance requests very

author: Emily Cain
review: Evergreen Properties NW is an excellent property management group. They really care about the needs and concerns of their renters and are so quick to take care of problems that you are having. Within one day of putting in a maintenance request they were here fixing our shower, absolutely the best people to rent from.

author: Kayce Kutch
review: I rented this space sight unseen when I moved to Bellingham from out of state. Ive lived here for almost 3 years and it has been absolutely wonderful. My lease is up at the end of the month and I would stay if I wasnt moving into a house! Thank you for an easy 3 years.

ownerResponse.text:
Kayce,

It has been a pleasure having you as a tenant.  Thank you for the kind review!

author: Kenny Roman
review:
Awesome managent company!

Been renting from these guys for about 9 months now and they have been on the

author: sl vs
review: As far as property managers in Bellingham go, these folks are a giant leap ahead of the rest. As a newer company, sometimes they might get a little busy and overwhelmed, especially as they adjust to new growth, more tenants, and more

author: Andre Merritt
review: Awesome place to live. The staff is very helpful and respond to all needs expediantly. Would definitely rent from their properties again!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you, Andre!  We are glad to hear you had a good experience with us.  Casey Trosin, Managing Broker

author: John Snow
review: Avoid at all costs. Probably one of the worst ones out here in town.

ownerResponse.text:
John,

I'm sorry.  I have no record of you in our system.  Perhaps your confused about which company your speaking of.
Dan, I believe you have the wrong company.  Please call Casey if you have a concern with our marketing tactics.  We are a fair and transparent with all of our advertising.
